stages.name: normalize
stages.description: Full normalization pipeline: tilize, reduce_mean, subtract_mean, square, reduce_var, inv_std (add_eps + rsqrt), multiply by inv_std, untilize. No gamma/beta.

Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.

stages.name: gamma
stages.description: Add gamma (scale) affine transform. Reader reads gamma RM stick and tilizes into cb_gamma. Compute multiplies normalized result by gamma with ROW broadcast.
stages.extra_ttnn_setup: gamma_tt = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

stages.name: affine
stages.description: Add beta (shift) affine transform. Reader reads beta RM stick. Compute adds beta with ROW broadcast after gamma multiply. Full layer_norm with weight and bias.
stages.extra_setup:
gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, input_tensor.shape[-1])
beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, input_tensor.shape[-1])
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma_tt = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
beta_tt = ttnn.from_torch(beta, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
